initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS sum_ss_net_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_date BETWEEN DATE '2000-01-01' AND DATE '2000-12-31'
    AND store.s_zip IN (
        SELECT ca_zip
        FROM customer_address
        WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
    )
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    sum_ss_net_profit ASC;

SELECT 
    s.s_store_name,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS sum_ss_net_profit
FROM 
    store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON ss.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_date BETWEEN DATE '2000-01-01' AND DATE '2000-12-31'
    AND s.s_zip IN (
        SELECT ca_zip 
        FROM customer_address 
        WHERE ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'FL')
    )
GROUP BY 
    s.s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    sum_ss_net_profit ASC;

SELECT s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS sum_ss_net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN customer_address ON store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_date BETWEEN DATE '2001-01-16' AND DATE '2001-02-15'
  AND store.s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_zip IN (
      '49611', '49612', '49613', '49614', '49615', '49616', '49617', '49618', '49619', '49620',
      '49621', '49622', '49623', '49624', '49625', '49626', '49627', '49628', '49629', '49630',
      '49631', '49632', '49633', '49634', '49635', '49636', '49637', '49638', '49639', '49640',
      '49641', '49642', '49643', '49644', '49645', '49646', '49647', '49648', '49649', '49650',
      '49651', '49652', '49653', '49654', '49655', '49656', '49657', '49658', '49659', '49660'
    )
  )
GROUP BY s_store_name
ORDER BY sum_ss_net_profit ASC;

SELECT s.s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS sum_ss_net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN store s ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN customer_address ON store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_date BETWEEN DATE '2000-01-01' AND DATE '2000-12-31'
  AND s.s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_zip IN ('12345', '67890', '11111', '22222')
  )
GROUP BY s.s_store_name
ORDER BY sum_ss_net_profit ASC

SELECT s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS sum_ss_net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN customer_address ON store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_date BETWEEN DATE '2000-01-01' AND DATE '2000-12-31'
  AND store.s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_zip IN ('40801','40802','40803','40804','40805','40806','40807','40808','40809','40810')
  )
GROUP BY s_store_name
ORDER BY sum_ss_net_profit ASC
